overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European city. The character moves from narrow cobblestone alleys past workers repairing a wooden structure, through a dark brick tunnel, into a bustling open town square with market stalls and a prominent clock tower, then ascends a curved stone staircase for an elevated view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alley with wooden bridge repair site

events.description: Geralt stands up from crouching position near workers and begins walking forward
passing the wooden bridge structure, leaving the workers behind as the alley narrows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the narrow cobblestone alley, passing workers who are hammering and repairing a wooden bridge structure on the right

notable_agents.action: workers hammering on wooden planks of the bridge structure

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered building with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
red brick building with arched windows and stone trim
wooden platform and railing under construction or repair
irregular stone cobblestones forming the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow medieval alley where Geralt is near workers repairing a wooden bridge. The environment features traditional half-timbered houses on the left and brick buildings on the right. Geralt begins walking forward, leaving the workers behind as he proceeds down the sunlit cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ivy-covered alley approaching stone archway tunnel

events.description: entering deeper shadow cast by tall buildings, light becomes more dappled and green-tinted from ivy
approaching the dark stone archway tunnel entrance at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the narrow street, passing an NPC sitting on a bench near the ivy-covered building

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench outside the ivy-covered building

entered.detail: red brick building heavily covered in green ivy and vines
large stone archway entrance leading into a dark brick tunnel
wooden cart or wagon parked near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrower section of the alley where buildings are covered in dense ivy. The lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed. He passes a wooden cart and a seated NPC before approaching the dark stone archway tunnel entrance that dominates the end of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark brick tunnel with wanted posters

events.description: entering the dark brick tunnel, dramatic reduction in light levels
approaching tunnel exit, bright daylight visible at the far end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the dimly lit brick tunnel, his footsteps echoing on the cobblestones as he passes a beggar sitting against the wall

notable_agents.action: beggar sitting on the ground with hand extended asking for alms

entered.detail: curved brick ceiling and walls of the tunnel with stone trim
paper posters with drawings attached to the brick walls
bright circular light at the end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a dark, enclosed brick tunnel with low lighting. Wanted posters line the walls. Geralt walks steadily toward the bright exit light at the far end, passing a beggar sitting against the left wall. The tunnel creates a dramatic transition between the narrow alley and the open square beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling medieval town square with market stalls and clock tower

events.description: exiting the dark tunnel into the bright open town square with market activity
Geralt stops briefly to look up at the tall clock tower and surrounding architecture

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerges into the bustling town square, pausing to observe the clock tower and market activity before continuing through the crowd

notable_agents.action: merchant standing near market stall with red and white striped canopy

entered.detail: tall ornate clock tower with red banners and multiple levels with dark timber framing
wooden market stalls with red and white canopies selling goods
red and yellow decorative banners strung across the square
traditional Germanic style buildings with exposed wooden beams and plaster
wide open cobblestone plaza with scattered market activity

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel into a bright, bustling medieval town square. The scene opens up to reveal a prominent clock tower with red banners, market stalls with colorful canopies, and crowds of NPCs browsing. The architecture shifts to ornate half-timbered buildings decorated with festive banners. Geralt pauses briefly to take in the view before continuing through the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase overlooking the town square

events.description: Geralt begins ascending the curved stone staircase on the right side of the square
reaching the top of the stairs, pausing to overlook the town square from the elevated position

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs the curved stone staircase, passing a woman in a red dress, and pauses at the top to look over the town square from the elevated vantage point

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress with yellow headscarf standing at the top of the stairs looking at the view

entered.detail: wide curved stone stairs with worn steps ascending along the building
stone balustrade and railing at the top of the stairs providing a view

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt ascending a curved stone staircase on the edge of the square. He passes a woman in a red dress standing at the overlook. From the top, the camera reveals an elevated view of the town square below, with the clock tower now in the distance and the market activity visible from above. The segment ends with Geralt looking out over the scene from the stone railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, shadowed medieval alleyway into a bright, expansive town square and up to an elevated overlook. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone path beside workers repairing a wooden bridge, moving past half-timbered houses before the environment tightens into a shadowed corridor draped in dense ivy. As the camera follows Geralt through a dark, enclosed brick tunnel lined with wanted posters, the lighting shifts dramatically from gloom toward a bright exit. The scene then opens wide into a bustling town square filled with colorful market stalls, festive banners, and a prominent clock tower. Finally, the camera ascends a curved stone staircase, passing a woman in a red dress to reveal a sweeping aerial view of the market activity from behind a stone railing.
